title: If SpaceX’s Moonshots Fail, It Will Always Have Starlink
title_cn: 如果 SpaceX 的登月计划失败，星链仍将存在
summary: A simple view of SpaceX is that it’s a low-cost rocket launcher that created the profitable Starlink satellite business and which is now burning cash to build orbital data centers and colonize Mars. Starlink doesn’t have the lead role in SpaceX’s $1.8 trillion initial public offering. But it is the real business inside the company, and the telecoms industry and its regulators can ill afford to be complacent about the disruptive threat it poses.

title: Volvo Eyes $3 Billion Autonomous Truck Business in Five Years
title_cn: 沃尔沃计划五年内实现 30 亿美元的自动驾驶卡车业务
summary: Volvo AB expects revenue from autonomous transportation to approach $3 billion within five years after starting driverless operations on US highways in a few months.

summary: Carlyle Group Inc. has invited pitches from investment banks to advise on a potential India initial public offering of its recently acquired healthcare billing service business, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Cannabis Medicine for Back Pain Aims to Displace Opioids
title_cn: 治疗背痛的大麻药物旨在取代阿片类药物
summary: A cannabis drug for lower back pain will soon go on sale in Germany and Austria in what its developer views as a dry run for launching in the world’s biggest pharma market: the US.

summary: The manager of the largest leveraged exchange-traded fund tracking SK Hynix Inc. pushed back against claims that the $10 billion product is adding to volatility in the South Korean chipmaker’s shares.

title_cn: 由于伦敦需求疲软影响租金，办公空间价格大幅下跌
summary: Workspace Group Plc, a London landlord providing flexible office space to the city’s small- and medium sized-business, reported a worse than expected loss in the year through March as falling rents and rising vacancy hit valuations.

summary: Bizlink Holding Inc. has agreed to buy the information and communications technology unit of Blackstone Inc.’s Interplex in a deal valued at about $850 million.

title: Meta Partners With Reliance on First India AI Data Center
title_cn: Meta 与印度首个人工智能数据中心合作
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is partnering with Reliance Industries Ltd. to build its first AI data center in India, adding to a wave of investment in tech infrastructure globally.

title: France’s Proparco Plans Sri Lanka Investments After Default
title_cn: 法国 Proparco 计划在违约后对斯里兰卡进行投资
summary: Proparco, the private-sector financing arm of Agence Française de Développement, plans to fund Sri Lankan companies involved in renewable energy, agribusiness and women-led small enterprises, according to Vincent Vandenbussche, acting regional director for South Asia.

title: Ambani-Backed Robot Startup Seeks $100 Million to Lead in India
title_cn: 安巴尼支持的机器人初创公司寻求 1 亿美元以在印度取得领先地位
summary: Indian startup Addverb Technologies Ltd. is seeking to raise more than $100 million, trying to cement its role as the country’s top maker of robots.

title_cn: 印度银行股价因存款和收益率担忧缓解而上涨

title: Governments Sell Bonds at Record Pace as Spending Soars
title_cn: 随着支出飙升，政府以创纪录的速度出售债券
summary: Governments are borrowing from syndicated bond markets at a record clip as public spending surges.

title: China Taps Commercial Oil Stocks to Help Weather Gulf Shock
title_cn: 中国利用商业石油库存来帮助应对海湾冲击
summary: China has started tapping its commercial crude reserves to help offset the supply shock from the Iran war, although the world’s biggest oil importer is continuing to prioritize lower refinery use and fuel export limits to manage the fallout.

title: US, Iran Exchange Strikes, Putting Lasting Peace Deal at Risk
title_cn: 美国与伊朗交锋，持久和平协议面临风险
summary: The US and Iran exchanged strikes overnight, jolting their two-month-old truce and endangering talks aimed at securing lasting peace in the Middle East.

title: Tech Selloff Deepens as Traders Brace for Hot CPI: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着交易员准备应对高额消费者物价指数，科技股抛售加剧：市场总结
summary: Technology stocks were set to pull US equities lower for a second straight session as traders prepared for an inflation report that is expected to show the highest reading in more than three years.

title: Oil Erases Gain as Traders Weigh Fallout From US-Iran Strikes
title_cn: 交易员权衡美国和伊朗袭击的影响，油价回吐涨幅
summary: Oil erased gains as traders weighed the outlook for peace talks over the Iran war after a brief US military campaign against the Islamic Republic following the downing of an American helicopter.

title: Dubai’s DP World Meets Bond Investors to Allay Worries Over War
title_cn: 迪拜迪拜环球港务集团与债券投资者会面，以减轻对战争的担忧
summary: DP World Ltd., one of the world’s biggest container port operators, has been meeting with fixed-income investors to discuss its performance since the outbreak of the US-Iran war as the Dubai logistics giant mulls its options for repaying a bond due in a few months.

title: Bitcoin Finds a Bounce, Not a Bottom
title_cn: 比特币找到了反弹，而不是底部
summary: The cryptocurrency’s modest rebound may prove short-lived as structural frailties are exposed.

title: Gold Slumps Below $4,200 as Renewed US-Iran Clashes Test Truce
title_cn: 美伊冲突升级测试休战，金价跌破 4,200 美元
summary: Gold extended a decline after the US and Iran exchanged strikes following the downing of an American military helicopter, jeopardizing efforts to end the war that’s roiled global markets and raised inflation risks.

title: JPMorgan-Led Group to Sell Qualtrics Hung Debt at Year End
title_cn: 摩根大通领导的集团将于年底出售 Qualtrics 挂牌债务
summary: A group of banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. is planning to offload about $5.3 billion in financing for software firm Qualtrics International Inc. later this year in a bid to shift the hung debt off their books.

title: Wedding Inflation Has Brides Paying Witches For Perfect Days
title_cn: 婚礼通货膨胀导致新娘付钱给女巫以获得完美的婚礼
summary: Picture this: It’s the week of your wedding. You’re staring down a forecast of clouds and rain. What do you do? A lot of brides have taken to hiring a weather witch. Josyana Joshua explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Releases New Mythos-Like Model Ahead of IPO | The Opening Trade 6/10/2026
title_cn: Anthropic 在 IPO 前发布新的神话般的模型 |开盘交易 6/10/2026
summary:
Anthropic has released its latest Mythos model, Fable 5, though with one major caveat. The AI will reportedly be blocked from responding to queries related to cybersecurity and biology. It comes as the company races to IPO, along with rivals SpaceX and OpenAI.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oracle Earnings Pose Next Test for Suddenly Shaky AI Stock Rally
title_cn: 甲骨文财报为突然摇摇欲坠的人工智能股票涨势带来下一个考验
summary: The rally in artificial intelligence-related stocks is suddenly on shaky footing, and Oracle Corp.’s earnings report after the close represents the group’s next test.

title: Xinjiang Chief Touts Trade, Diplomacy as Hormuz Disruption Bites
title_cn: 霍尔木兹中断之际，新疆酋长大力宣传贸易和外交
summary: China is pitching its far-western Xinjiang region as a commercial gateway to Central Asia and Europe, courting neighbors at a moment when overland trade routes are drawing renewed attention due to shipping disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Slowing Economy Gives Turkey Cover to Hold Interest Rates Again
title_cn: 经济放缓为土耳其再次维持利率提供了保障
summary: Turkey’s central bank is poised to leave its benchmark interest rate unchanged in the face of a cooling economy and subdued foreign currency demand despite rising prices driven by the Iran war.

title: South Africa’s Eskom Spinoff Plan Raises Credit Concerns
title_cn: 南非 Eskom 分拆计划引发信贷担忧
summary: South Africa’s plan to split power utility Eskom Holdings SOC Ltd. into separate units could weaken the state-owned company’s risk profile because the transmission assets account for a major share of its earnings, according to a bondholder and a ratings agency.

title: WH Smith Cuts Outlook, Seeks Capital as Iran War Hurts Sales
title_cn: 由于伊朗战争损害销售，WH Smith 下调前景并寻求资金
summary: WH Smith Plc lowered its profit outlook and set out a plan to raise capital as the fallout from the war in the Middle East weighs on sales at its network of airport stores.

title: Suez Canal Gets Oil-Tanker Boost Amid Hormuz Strait Shutdown
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭期间苏伊士运河油轮数量增加
summary: The number of oil tankers crossing Egypt’s Suez Canal surged by almost a third in April and drove revenue to the highest since early 2024, as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz spurred an alternative Red Sea energy route.

title: Malaysia Palm Reserves Jump Most in Five Months as Exports Drop
title_cn: 由于出口下降，马来西亚棕榈储量五个月来涨幅最大
summary: Palm oil stockpiles in Malaysia climbed at the fastest pace in five months as a sharp drop in exports overshadowed weaker production in the world’s second-largest grower.

title: Subtle RBI Rule Tweak Opens Door to $50 Billion Inflow to India
title_cn: 印度储备银行规则的微妙调整为 500 亿美元流入印度打开了大门
summary: A tweak to a single sentence within an arcane central bank circular has opened the door for billions of additional dollars to flow into India under a new incentive plan.

title: Apollo’s Kleinman Sees Private Equity Capitulating on Values
title_cn: 阿波罗的克莱曼认为私募股权正在向价值观屈服
summary: Private equity “lost its way a little bit” during the easy-money era and firms will “have to start capitulating for sure on valuations” after borrowing costs normalized, warned Scott Kleinman, co-president of Apollo Global Management Inc.

title: Here’s a Look at How India Could Further Boost Dollar Inflows
title_cn: 看看印度如何进一步促进美元流入
summary: India is weighing further steps to attract foreign investment into the country, just days after rolling out a sweeping package aimed at boosting inflows and shoring up its external finances.

title: India Boosts LNG Buying to Meet Fertilizer, Power Requirements
title_cn: 印度增加液化天然气购买以满足化肥和电力需求
summary: India has ramped up purchases of liquefied natural gas from the spot market as importers rush to replace disrupted Middle Eastern supply and meet demand from fertilizer plants, power generators and households.

title: Banks Pay 7% on Dollar Deposits as India Seeks Fresh Foreign Currency
title_cn: 印度寻求新的外币，银行支付 7% 的美元存款利率
summary: Indian lenders have sharply raised rates on foreign-currency deposits to lure the nation’s overseas residents, offering an early test of the central bank’s recent measures to bring in capital flows to support the rupee.

title: Hedge Funds on Asia Alpha
title_cn: 亚洲阿尔法对冲基金
summary: Sam Kellie-Smith, CEO & Chief Investment Officer, APAC, Jain Global and Kenny Lam, CEO, Two Sigma Asia Pacific discuss how both liquidity, and opportunities, have grown in Asia with Bloomberg’s Erik Schatzker at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Edaa on Market Infrastructure and Capital Flows
title_cn: Edaa 市场基础设施和资本流动
summary: Hanan Mohammad AlShehri, CEO, Securities Depository Center Company (Edaa), Saudi Tadawul Group discusses opening Saudi Arabia’s capital markets to foreign investors with Bloomberg’s Lulu Chen at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nippon Steel Gets ¥90 Billion Via First Bond Since US Steel
title_cn: 新日铁通过美国钢铁公司以来首笔债券融资 900 亿日元
summary: Nippon Steel Corp. raised ¥90 billion ($560 million) via its first straight-bond offering since completing the acquisition of United States Steel Corp.

title: In Conversation With Clara Chan
title_cn: 与克拉拉·陈对话
summary: Clara Chan, CEO, Hong Kong Investment Corporation Ltd. discusses strategic early investment in AI and large language models with Bloomberg’s Stephen Engle at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea Stock Hedging Surges to Level That Warned of Past Selloffs
title_cn: 韩国股市对冲飙升至对过去抛售发出警告的水平
summary: The number of bearish options tied to South Korea’s Kospi 200 Index has climbed so sharply relative to bullish wagers that it is nearing a level that previously foreshadowed market declines.

title: Bonnie Chan on IPO Momentum
title_cn: Bonnie Chan 谈 IPO 势头
summary: Bonnie Chan, CEO, Hong Kong Exchanges & Clearing Ltd. discusses Hong Kong’s IPO pipeline explaining issuers and investors a lot more engaged than in previous years. She was speaking to Bloomberg’s David Ingles at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: All the Ways Wall Street Gets Paid to Fund AI Boom
title_cn: 华尔街为人工智能繁荣提供资金的所有方式
summary: Enormous valuations are rewriting the IPO playbook.

title: BNP Sees US Mega IPOs Fueling Appetite for Tech Deals in Europe
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行认为美国大型IPO刺激了欧洲科技交易的兴趣
summary: Mega IPOs by some of the largest privately held tech companies are likely to fuel appetite for stock sales in Europe’s tech industry as well, according to a top BNP Paribas SA investment banker.

title: Baidu CFO Tells 'Odd Lots' About How OpenClaw Founder Sought to Collaborate
title_cn: 百度首席财务官讲述了 OpenClaw 创始人如何寻求合作的“奇怪的事情”
summary: Baidu CFO Henry He is asked about Dario Amodei's past work at the Chinese company and instead reveals how OpenClaw's creator "asked Baidu to work with him" to beef up search skills for the popular AI personal assistant. He spoke to Bloomberg's Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway in a live taping of the Odd Lots podcast at Bloomberg Invest Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SVP Sees a ‘Lot of Canaries in the Coal Mine’ in Private Markets
title_cn: 高级副总裁在私募市场中看到“煤矿里的金丝雀”
summary: Victor Khosla, the founder of credit investor Strategic Value Partners, speaks to Bloomberg's Dani Burger at the SuperReturn conference in Berlin about warning signs in private markets. “There are entire sectors like private equity, like real estate, which are constipated — they can't sell," Khosla says. "Private credit just joined the party a little bit too.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BizLink to Buy Blackstone’s Interplex in $850 Million Deal
title_cn: BizLink 将斥资 8.5 亿美元收购 Blackstone 的 Interplex
summary: Taiwan’s BizLink Holding Inc. has agreed to acquire Blackstone Inc.’s information and communications technology business Interplex Datacom.

title: Cambridge Aerospace in Talks to Raise at $3.5 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 剑桥航空航天公司正在洽谈将估值提高至 35 亿美元
summary: Cambridge Aerospace, a British defense technology startup developing interceptor systems to protect against drones and cruise missiles, is in discussions to raise approximately $300 million at a valuation of around $3.5 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Ant International Considers Raising $1 Billion to Boost Growth
title_cn: 蚂蚁金服考虑筹集 10 亿美元以促进增长
summary: Ant Group Co.’s international business is considering raising about $1 billion to accelerate growth, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: Morgan Stanley 'Doubling Down' on European AI Trade
title_cn: 摩根士丹利“加倍押注”欧洲人工智能贸易
summary: Morgan Stanley Chief European Equity Strategist Marina Zavolock discusses the artificial intelligence trade and why she has a strong personal conviction on Europe. "The fundamentals are just outstanding, and they're just going higher," she tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/10/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/10/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Paramount’s Middle East Billions in Warner Bid Get EU Probe
title_cn: 派拉蒙影业向华纳竞购中东数十亿美元遭欧盟调查
summary: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. is being reviewed under the European Union’s Foreign Subsidies Regulation, with regulators probing involvement of Middle Eastern funds helping to bankroll the takeover.

title: Logitech Debuts $80 Travel Mouse With Unique Folding Design
title_cn: 罗技推出 80 美元的旅行鼠标，具有独特的折叠设计
summary: Computer accessory maker Logitech International SA announced a sleek wireless travel mouse aimed at professionals and Gen Z, with a unique folding design meant to fit in a pocket.

title: Sea’s Shopee Cuts Hundreds of Developer Jobs During Pivot to AI
title_cn: Sea 的 Shopee 在转向人工智能期间削减了数百名开发人员职位
summary: Sea Ltd.’s Shopee is cutting hundreds of developer jobs globally, joining rivals across the world in slashing staff while they adopt AI in the workplace and develop new services based on the technology.

title: Leonardo CEO Eyes Green Light for Space Venture in 2027
title_cn: 莱昂纳多首席执行官为 2027 年太空创业开绿灯
summary: Leonardo SpA’s new chief executive officer expects European regulatory approval for its satellite venture with Airbus SE and Thales SA by the end of next year, clearing the way for one of Europe’s most ambitious defense and space projects.

title: ASML’s Surge Masks Lowball Valuation Relative to Peers
title_cn: ASML 的飙升掩盖了相对于同行的低估值
summary: ASML's ascent to fresh record highs has been a highlight for European markets, yet it’s done little to improve what is the semiconductor firm's cheapest relative valuation in years. Its forward price-to-earnings ratio relative to major peers is at the lowest in more than a decade. Bloomberg's Dasha Afanasieva reports from Amsterdam. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Expect Strong Second Half of Year for Private Equity: Carlyle's Steve Wise
title_cn: 凯雷投资的史蒂夫·怀斯预计下半年私募股权将表现强劲
summary: Carlyle's Co-Head of American Private Equity, Steve Wise, says activity is starting to pick up in private markets, with credit markets in good shape and a good backdrop for M&A. In an interview on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on June 9, Wise also discussed the strength of the US economy and why Carlyle is investing in the defense and industrial industries.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google's Backstops Underpin $35 Billion Anthropic Chip Deal
title_cn: 谷歌的支持支撑了 350 亿美元的人类芯片交易
summary: Anthropic is leasing powerful computer chips at five data centers with help from Google, one of the artificial intelligence firm's earliest investors. Google has agreed to backstop lease payments at each location, helping Anthropic obtain what amounts to a $35 billion loan. Bloomberg's Neil Campling explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tata Boss Predicts AI Agents Will Replace Half Its Tech Jobs
title_cn: 塔塔老板预测人工智能代理将取代一半的技术工作
summary: The boss of one of India’s largest conglomerates predicted AI agents will replace half the jobs at IT leader Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. in future, joining a growing list of company chiefs warning about major disruptions as artificial intelligence matures.

title: TSMC’s Monthly Sales Rise 30% Thanks to Sustained AI Chip Demand
title_cn: AI芯片需求持续旺盛，台积电月销售额增长30%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported a 30% rise in its monthly sales, reflecting continued strength in demand spurred by a global rush to build AI infrastructure.

title: Taiwan Eyes Curbs on AI Chip Sales to China to Align With US
title_cn: 台湾希望与美国保持一致，限制对中国大陆的人工智能芯片销售
summary: Taiwan authorities are considering much stricter export controls on AI chip sales to China to further align with US measures, according to people familiar with the matter, an effort to address semiconductor smuggling that risks drawing a rebuke from Beijing.

title: Einride Joins US-Listed Driverless Trucking Rivals on Nasdaq
title_cn: Einride 加入纳斯达克美国上市无人驾驶卡车竞争对手行列
summary: Swedish driverless truck group Einride AB will make its trading debut in New York on Wednesday with hopes of benefiting from the investor buzz generated by SpaceX’s initial public offering later in the week.

title: Fmr. Australian Ambo to US on Geopolitics
title_cn: 先生。澳大利亚安博向美国谈地缘政治
summary:
Dennis Richardson, former Australian Ambassador to the US, discusses the future for Australia–US relations at a time of heightened geopolitical tensions and fragile global alliances amid trade strains.
He speaks exclusively with Haidi Stroud Watts at the Morgan Stanley Australia summit in Sydney on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore Court Moves to Seize Capital A’s Assets in Dispute
title_cn: 新加坡法院采取行动扣押 Capital A 的争议资产
summary: A Singapore court has moved to seize stakes in fintech firm Big Pay and logistics unit Teleport held by Capital A Bhd.’s Move Digital Sdn. to enforce an arbitration award stemming from a shareholder dispute.

title: Nintendo Shares Slide After 2026 Game Showcase Disappoints
title_cn: 2026 年游戏展示令人失望后，任天堂股价下滑
summary: Nintendo Co.’s shares fell by the most in a month after the game maker’s presentation of upcoming games came up short on brand-new titles from heavyweight franchises such as Mario.

title: ASML’s Surge to Record High Masks Lowball Valuation Versus Peers
title_cn: ASML 口罩销量飙升创历史新高，估值相对于同行偏低
summary: ASML Holding NV’s ascent to fresh record highs has been a highlight for European markets, yet it’s done little to improve what is the stock’s cheapest relative valuation in years.

title: Stocks Pare Tech-Led Drop as Rotation Gains Speed | The Close 6/9/2026
title_cn: 随着轮动加快，股市收窄科技股主导的跌幅收盘价 6/9/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Amerant Investments Senior Vice President & Chief Investment Officer Baylor Lancaster-Samuel, Mizuho Americas Head of Investment & Corporate Banking Michal Katz, Evercore Co-Head of Us Investment Banking Naveen Nataraj, IBM CEO Arvind Krishna, Uniphore CEO & Co-Founder Umesh Sachdev, Schwab Center for Financial Research’s Kevin Gordon, AlphaSimplex Chief Research Strategist Katy Kaminski, FIS President & CEO Stephanie Ferris, Lumentum Holdings CEO Michael Hurlston, & FIFA World Cup North Texas Organizing Committee Co-Chair Dan Hunt, Bruin Capital Founder & CEO George Pyne. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Super Micro Seeks $7 Billion in Equity Deal for AI Equipment
title_cn: Super Micro 寻求 70 亿美元的 AI 设备股权交易
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. plans to raise $7 billion through a package of equity offerings to purchase the components needed to fulfill customers’ orders for the company’s artificial intelligence servers.

title: Lumentum CEO: See Huge Opportunity for Optics Industry
title_cn: Lumentum首席执行官：看到光学行业的巨大机遇
summary: Michael Hurlston, CEO of Lumentum, discussed the critical role of indium phosphide in optical chips, particularly lasers, which are essential for the AI revolution. He explained that the increasing speeds and bandwidth requirements in data centers are driving a shift toward optical connectivity using fiber optics, as light offers unmatched transmission speed. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lula Widens Lead Over Flávio Bolsonaro Ahead of Vote, Poll Shows
title_cn: 民意调查显示，卢拉在投票前扩大了对弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗的领先优势
summary: President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva widened his lead over Senator Flávio Bolsonaro after the challenger was embroiled in a corruption scandal and the US increased pressure on Brazil ahead of October’s election, a new poll showed.

title: Philippines, Japan Plan Sea Border Talks Amid China Warning
title_cn: 在中国发出警告之际，菲律宾和日本计划举行海上边界谈判
summary: The Philippines intends to pursue talks on maritime borders with Japan despite opposition from Beijing, according to Manila’s Foreign Affairs Secretary Ma. Theresa Lazaro.

title: Germany’s Global Ambitions Are Taking a Hit
title_cn: 德国的全球野心受到打击
summary: Berlin failed to win a non-permanent seat at the UN Security Council for the first time.

title: UK Treasury Resists Defense Spending Push in 11th-Hour Talks
title_cn: 英国财政部在第 11 小时的会谈中抵制国防开支推动
summary: The UK Treasury continues to resist a push to speed up an increase in defense spending, just days out from unveiling the country’s long-delayed military investment plan.

title: Hungary Unveils Anti-Corruption Bill to Access EU Funds
title_cn: 匈牙利公布反腐败法案以获取欧盟资金
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s administration has filed legislation to unlock funds the European Union had blocked over concerns about corruption and rule of law under former leader Viktor Orban.

title: US, Iran Trade Fire After Helicopter Downed Near Hormuz
title_cn: 直升机在霍尔木兹附近坠落后，美国与伊朗交火
summary: The US and Iran exchanged strikes overnight after President Donald Trump retaliated against Tehran for shooting down an American Apache helicopter which was patrolling the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Afghanistan Says 13 Killed in Pakistan Cross-Border Strikes
title_cn: 阿富汗称巴基斯坦跨境袭击造成13人死亡
summary: Afghanistan said Pakistani strikes overnight in its eastern provinces killed 13 people, including children, renewing tensions between the neighbors that have clashed for months leaving hundreds dead on both sides.

title: Ethiopia’s Ruling Party Streaks Ahead in Early Vote Count
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚执政党在早期计票中领先
summary: Ethiopia’s ruling party took a commanding lead as preliminary results trickled in from elections that are widely expected to hand Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed another five-year term.

title: US & Iran Trade Strikes, Testing Ceasefire Agreement | Daybreak Europe 6/10/2026
title_cn: 美国和伊朗贸易打击，测试停火协议|黎明欧洲 6/10/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. 

US forces carried out strikes against Iran hours after President Donald Trump blamed Tehran for shooting down an American military helicopter off the coast of Oman. Iran’s joint military command said it had targeted “several US bases in the region.”

Stocks resumed their slide as technology shares remained under pressure and investors trimmed positions ahead of a key inflation reading in the US. Gold dropped.

And Anthropic is widely releasing a version of Mythos that will be blocked from carrying out cybersecurity tasks, months after warning that the powerful artificial intelligence model could spot and exploit vulnerabilities in critical software.

Today's guests: Pilar Gomez-Bravo, MFS Investment Management, Co-CIO of Fixed Income; Julian Salisbury, Co-CIO, Sixth Street. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swedes’ Support for Euro Entry Fades With Krona Seen as Buffer
title_cn: 瑞典人对欧元加入的支持减弱，克朗被视为缓冲
summary: Swedes’ enthusiasm for joining the euro area fell for a second successive year, signaling they remain confident in the krona and its ability to act as a buffer for the largest Nordic economy in turbulent global markets.

title: Police, Protesters Clash in Kenya over US Ebola Facility
title_cn: 肯尼亚警察与抗议者因美国埃博拉设施发生冲突
summary: Kenyan police fired teargas at protesters demonstrating against a planned quarantine facility for US servicemen and citizens exposed to the Ebola virus. Bloomberg's Helen Nyambura reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Cements Sway Over North Korea as Kim Names China Priority
title_cn: 金正恩将中国列为优先事项，习近平巩固了对朝鲜的影响力
summary: Kim Jong Un feted Chinese President Xi Jinping with two days of lavish celebrations in Pyongyang, calling ties with China a “top priority” in a clear message that Beijing, not Moscow, remains North Korea’s most important partner.

title: Japan and Malaysia Agree on Deeper Maritime Defense Cooperation
title_cn: 日本和马来西亚就深化海上防务合作达成一致
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi and her Malaysian counterpart Anwar Ibrahim agreed to further cooperation on defense and energy supplies, an alignment based on common concerns over China’s maritime claims and the economic disruptions from the Iran war.

title: Philippines Urges China to Remove Structure in Disputed Shoal
title_cn: 菲律宾敦促中国拆除争议浅滩上的建筑物
summary: The Philippines has asked China to remove a floating structure that it has monitored in a disputed shoal in the South China Sea, as tensions between the two nations flare up anew.

title: Young Koreans Demand Answers on Ballot Shortage as Probe Begins
title_cn: 调查开始后，韩国年轻人要求就选票短缺问题给出答案
summary: Young voters in South Korea are condemning the government’s handling of local elections after dozens of polling stations ran short of ballots, forcing some people to leave without voting and others to cast ballots after counting had begun.

title: Nevada Attorney General Wins Democratic Gubernatorial Primary
title_cn: 内华达州总检察长赢得民主党州长初选
summary: Aaron Ford, Nevada’s attorney general, has prevailed over a crowded field of Democrats to face off against first-term Governor Joe Lombardo, a Republican, in a race that will test voters’ willingness to back President Donald Trump’s economic agenda in the midst of headwinds caused in part by his policies.

title: US Denies North Korea Nuclear Arms ‘Closed Issue’ After Xi Visit
title_cn: 习近平访问后美国否认朝鲜核武器问题“已结束”
summary: The US and Japan said they remain committed to the denuclearization of North Korea despite China’s apparent downgrading of the subject and Russia’s assertion that it was a “closed issue.”

title: Graham Platner Wins Democratic Senate Primary in Maine, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: Graham Platner 在缅因州赢得民主党参议院初选，DDHQ Projects
summary: Progressive Democrat Graham Platner won the party’s Senate primary in Maine after a bruising campaign which became as much about his accusations of past misbehavior as it was voters’ top concerns.

title: Prabowo Needs More Than Rate Hikes to Fix Market, Analysts Say
title_cn: 分析师表示，普拉博沃需要的不仅仅是加息来修复市场
summary: The surprise hike in Indonesia’s interest rates on Tuesday helped the rupiah rebound from a record low, but analysts say it likely won’t restore long-term investor confidence in President Prabowo Subianto’s management of the economy.

title: US Strikes Iran After Helicopter Downed, Testing Peace Talks
title_cn: 美国在直升机被击落后袭击伊朗，测试和谈
summary: US forces carried out strikes against Iran hours after President Donald Trump blamed Tehran for shooting down an American military helicopter off the coast of Oman.

title: US Needs Strategic Victory in Iran, Ex-Australian Envoy Says
title_cn: 前澳大利亚特使表示，美国需要在伊朗取得战略胜利
summary: The US must win its war against Iran strategically, not just militarily, said Dennis Richardson, a former Australian ambassador to Washington, as well as chief of the country’s defense and foreign affairs departments.

title: Graham Platner’s Scandals Risk Spoiling Democrats’ Maine Bet
title_cn: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳的丑闻可能会破坏民主党在缅因州的赌注
summary: Graham Platner heads into Maine’s Democratic Senate primary on Tuesday facing a fresh bout of controversy, turning what had looked like a coronation into a test of whether he’s a viable candidate for the party’s push to secure a majority in this year’s midterms.

title: Lindsey Graham Wins GOP Senate Primary in South Carolina, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: Lindsey Graham 在南卡罗来纳州赢得共和党参议院初选，DDHQ Projects
summary: Incumbent Lindsey Graham, who was endorsed by President Trump, is projected to win the Republican Senate primary in South Carolina, according to DDHQ.

title: US Launches 'Self-Defense' Strikes Against Iran | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/09/2026
title_cn: 美国对伊朗发动“自卫”打击权力平衡：最新版 06/09/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Retired Rear Admiral Mark Montgomery, Senior Fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies, says any US response after President Trump said Iran shot down an American Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz should target military sites tied to the attack and avoid economic targets that could escalate the conflict. Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation Chairman Travis Hill says he "fully" disagrees with Federal Reserve Governor Michael Barr's warning that recent regulatory changes could weaken bank safety and soundness, arguing regulators are trying to focus examiners on material financial risks while keeping the banking system balanced and resilient. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cuba Poised for Biggest US Fuel Shipment Since Cold War Embargo
title_cn: 古巴准备接收自冷战禁运以来最大规模的美国燃料运输
summary: A Florida trading company is in advanced talks to send Cuba the biggest cargo of US fuel since the Eisenhower administration as the island nation contends with an acute energy crisis.

title: Hegseth Plans Trip to Guantanamo Bay Amid US-Cuba Tensions
title_cn: 赫格斯计划在美古紧张局势中前往关塔那摩湾
summary: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth will travel to the US Navy base at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, on Wednesday as the Trump administration continues to demand drastic reforms by the communist government in Havana.

title: Customs Says $11.4 Billion Is Tied Up in US Tariff Refund Appeal
title_cn: 海关称美国关税退款上诉中涉及 114 亿美元
summary: A judge urged the Trump administration to back off its appeal of his order to fully refund $166 billion in tariffs overturned by the Supreme Court, saying it was unnecessary and would only create more delays for importers to get their money back.

title: South Carolina GOP Primary to Test Trump's Influence
title_cn: 南卡罗来纳州共和党初选将考验特朗普的影响力
summary: Bloomberg’s Anna Edgerton shares her insight on South Carolina’s Primary day as voters cast their ballots in a crowded field for the South Carolina GOP Governor nomination. Anna talks about the different candidates and how the votes may show which parts of President Trump’s agenda and MAGA values appeal most to voters. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)
